_comment: Paste the contents of this file into ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json on macOS (or %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json on Windows). Keep only the sections you actually need.

llmcode-sse._comment: Alternative: connect over Server-Sent Events. Use this when you already run llmcode hayhooks serve --transport sse on the same machine. Requires a bearer token even on localhost; generate it once with: openssl rand -hex 32

llmcode-remote._comment: Remote deployment behind TLS (caddy/nginx). Never bind hayhooks directly to 0.0.0.0 — always front it with a reverse proxy. See docs/hayhooks/security.md.
